title: 阪神大賞典の後に・重なりゆく大波

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Observing her race today, I can tell that Tamamo
Cross has gotten the hang of pacing herself
during a long-distance race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The following day, Oguri Cap wins a 2,000-meter
graded race on turf. Her potential feels
practically limitless at this point.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While caught up in the whirlwind of Oguri Cap's
growing momentum, Tamamo Cross advances to
the spring Tenno Sho.
